preferences.presence_color_help: Used to identify you in shared editing sessions.
preferences.create_site_lang_patch_failed_body: Your new site was created in English. To switch its language to Spanish, edit `telar_language` in <0>Config</0>.

empty_heading: You're not connected to any sites yet.
empty_subtext: Create your first site or connect a repo you already own.
github_empty_heading: Telar Compositor isn't installed anywhere yet.
github_empty_subtext: Install the GitHub App to connect a site.
delete_project_body: This permanently removes the project from the compositor. Your GitHub repository ({{owner}}/{{repo}}) is not touched — you can delete it separately on GitHub.
delete_project_active_warning_one: 1 collaborator is editing right now. They'll be disconnected immediately.
delete_project_active_warning_other: {{count}} collaborators are editing right now. They'll be disconnected immediately.
delete_project_toast_failure: Couldn't delete the project. Try again.
project_deleted_ws_toast: This project was deleted by the convenor — your unsaved changes are lost.
leave_project_body: You'll lose access. The convenor can re-invite you any time.
leave_project_toast_failure: Couldn't leave the project. Try again.
removed_from_project_ws_toast: You left this project from another tab.

danger_zone.heading: Danger zone
danger_zone.body: Permanent actions that affect your compositor account.
danger_zone.gated_helper: Delete the projects you convene first.
danger_zone.modal_body:
• Your compositor account and preferences will be deleted.
• You will be removed from {{count}} collaborator project(s).
• Your GitHub identity and repositories are not touched.
danger_zone.modal_body_solo_line: This will also delete projects that you work on without collaborators.
danger_zone.race_guard_error: You convene one or more projects again. Refresh the page.
